name: SportsVille
address: 37500 Center Ridge Rd, North Ridgeville, OH 44039
about: SportsVille Golf and Fun Zone is a high-tech practice and entertainment facility in North Ridgeville, Ohio, that is open year-round. The venue offers a variety of activities, including a covered and heated driving range, 20 bays equipped with Toptracer Range technology, an indoor golf center with multiple simulators, a miniature golf course, and batting cages for baseball and softball. Instructors from the SportsVille Golf Academy provide individual and group lessons for all skill levels. The facility has been extensively renovated, with significant upgrades including the addition of Toptracer technology in 2022, making it one of the best standalone driving ranges in the region. Pricing is based on a per-bay-hour model, with different rates for weekday and weekend hours, and is available for both individual and group play.
why_golfers_like_it: 20 Toptracer-equipped bays are available at no additional cost with any range bucket purchase
Year-round covered and heated bays provide a comfortable environment regardless of weather
Wide variety of activities including driving range, indoor golf, mini golf, and batting cages cater to diverse interests

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The text does not specify if clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The text does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks. However, it mentions gift cards that can be used for 'drinks and snacks,' suggesting they may have items available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 1 hour is required per person for 18 holes. For example, 4 golfers playing 18 holes would take 4 hours in total.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, SportsVille is described as a 'perfect destination for families and friends' and offers activities like miniature golf and a batting cage, making it a family-friendly venue.
